title: packera loratifolia
intro: Packera loratifolia, also known as Western Buttercup, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Packera loratifolia are primarily attributed to its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Packera loratifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
